title: DECISION: _Static_assert guards in wolftpm_rs_shim.c catch struct layout breaks at compile time
description: The two _Static_assert() calls in wolftpm_rs_shim.c (checking sizeof(TPM2_CTX) > sizeof(void*) and sizeof(WOLFTPM2_DEV) >= sizeof(TPM2_CTX)) are the right defense for accessing an internal field. A contributor might suggest removing them as 'unnecessary' — do not. They are the only automated guard against wolfTPM version incompatibility for the cmdBuf access.
